result:
Fleshed the brief and wrote it to `/workspace/nexus-mk2/.scratch/patron-anima-eval/eval-a/reps/3/patron-baseline/cli-flag-edit.md`.

Summary of the expansion:
- **Framed the decision**: patron/steward at terminal, renaming a writ mid-session, several times per session.
- **Tight scope**: add `--title` to `nsg writ edit`, accept it alone or with `--body`, reuse existing title validator, single audit entry, help text + 1–2 integration tests.
- **Explicit exclusions**: no other field edits, no `$EDITOR` for title, no bulk rename, no UI surface.
- **Concrete UX**: invocation examples, confirmation line format, atomic/all-or-nothing validation behavior, no-op rename suppression.
- **Assumptions flagged**: CLI is thin wrapper over books-level edit, lifecycle edit rules already exist, title validator exists, audit format already supports field-level diffs.
- **Deferred questions**: bare `--title` editor behavior, title propagation to denormalized/cached surfaces, permission model on edits.
